---
title: "Why Groups Struggle to Solve Problems Together"
description: "Group problem solving requires a different approach."
author: "synesis"
date: "2019-11-09"
categories: [society, links]
---

Group problem solving requires a different approach.

<https://lnkd.in/ghvsw3N>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_why-groups-struggle-to-solve-problems-together-activity-6599012874692243456-wWlx).*
